name: Chocolate Covered Ants
recipeIngredient: 1,742 large ants (if they are small, use 2,044)
recipeInstructions:
1. Catch ants at a picnic site and keep them in a glass jar with a teaspoon of sugar to keep them happy.
2. At home, carefully pick up each ant with tweezers and remove entrails using a small, very sharp knife edge (approximately 400 hours).
3. If you are short on time, skip this step; the difference will be negligible.
4. Dip each ant into melted chocolate and place them to drain on waxed paper.
5. If any ants still attempt to crawl off the paper, allow them to do so – enjoy your treat!
